tools.name: search_ai_tools
tools.description: Search the AICatalog directory of 20,000+ AI tools by keyword. Returns matching tools with name, tagline, catalog URL and pricing.

tools.name: get_tool
tools.description: Get full details for one AI tool by its slug (as returned by search_ai_tools).

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List all AI-tool categories available in the catalog.
